situation_summary: Key VP of Operations left. Support tickets spiked from 3 to 11 in 2 weeks. DAU dropped from 52 to 21. Health score fell from 79 to 42. Renewal in 55 days.
action_taken: P0 escalation of all tickets. Knowledge transfer session run within 3 days (recorded). EBR with CHRO and new VP of Operations. Dedicated support pod assigned for 30 days.
outcome: Renewed with no discount. New VP became enthusiastic champion. Health score recovered to 68 in 6 weeks.
csm_notes: Speed was everything. Same-day escalation and within-72-hour knowledge transfer prevented further erosion. New champion needed a quick win — we configured a live automation workflow during the KT session that saved them 4 hours immediately.
